ineqx 0.4.0

Package index

Main entry points

Unified function for descriptive and causal variance decomposition.

ineqx()
Variance decomposition
ineqx_params()
Create an ineqx_params object

Standard errors

Bootstrap configuration; delta-method SEs are computed automatically inside ineqx().

boot_config()
Create a bootstrap configuration
bootstrap_params()
Bootstrap resampled parameter objects (without decomposition)
decompose_boot_params()
Aggregate bootstrap SEs from cached params

Comparing scenarios

compare()
Compare multiple ineqx results

Plotting & theme

plot(<ineqx_causal_cross>)
Plot cross-sectional causal decomposition
plot(<ineqx_causal_longit>)
Plot longitudinal causal decomposition
plot(<ineqx_compare>)
Plot comparison of ineqx results
plot(<ineqx_desc>)
Plot descriptive variance decomposition
theme_ineqx
ineqx ggplot2 theme

Print & summary

Datasets

cps_sample
CPS sample data
incdat
Income data

Shiny demo

runShinyExample()
Run Shiny example app

On this page
